journey_steps.title: Choose direction
journey_steps.description: Pick intent and scenario so every generation matches your goal.

journey_steps.title: Generate hook
journey_steps.description: Lock a scroll-stopping opening before you expand the full script.

journey_steps.title: Generate content
journey_steps.description: Build captions, titles, or hashtag sets aligned with your hook.

journey_steps.title: Optimize structure
journey_steps.description: Tighten beats, CTA, and pacing using packages or a second pass.

journey_steps.title: Publish
journey_steps.description: Post to your platform — publish tracking comes next.

journey_steps.title: Review & iterate
journey_steps.description: Compare what you copied vs results; double down on what worked.
